[attempt {:keys [base-delay-ms max-delay-ms multiplier jitter?] :or {base-delay-ms 100 max-delay-ms 30000 multiplier 2.0 jitter? true}}]
[error-pred {:keys [max-attempts base-delay-ms max-delay-ms multiplier jitter?] :or {max-attempts 3 base-delay-ms 100 max-delay-ms 30000 multiplier 2.0 jitter? true}}]
